title: EventForge Event Envelope
description: Shared wrapper for every EventBridge event in the pipeline.

event_id.description: Unique ID for this event instance; used for idempotency in processed_events.

correlation_id.description: Threads one user query through API, workers, OTEL traces, and SSE.

job_id.description: Primary key of the jobs row in Postgres.

timestamp.description: When the event was produced (ISO 8601, UTC recommended).

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this event's payload contract, e.g. 1.0.

payload.description: Stage-specific body; validated by a separate payload schema.
